xEnglish: GCA Member Access Brief 001 is ready for review.
Planned GCA Member rule: purchase and continuously hold 1,000,000 GCA for 30 days before review eligibility.
The one-time member benefit review is 10,000 GCA after support and ledger approval, funded from reserve only. No new minting. Account intake is live; token transfer is manual only.
xChinese: GCA Member Access Brief 001 已准备好审核。
计划中的 GCA Member 规则：购买并连续持有 1,000,000 GCA 满 30 天，才进入审核资格。
一次性会员权益审核为 10,000 GCA，必须经过客服和账本审核后由储备转账，不增发；账户入口已上线，转账仍是人工处理。
telegram: GCA Member Access Brief 001 is ready for operator review.

The planned member rule requires 1,000,000 GCA held for 30 consecutive days before review eligibility. The planned 10,000 GCA member benefit requires support and ledger approval and must come from reserve only.
Account intake and eligible ledger records are live; member benefit transfers remain manual review only. Verify official links first: https://gcagochina.com/member-access-brief-001.html
nextPublishAction.visualTheme: Red GCA mark beside a simple member access checklist: 1,000,000 GCA, 30 days, review.
nextPublishAction.claimBoundary: Member access education only; no automatic benefit, no approval promise, no price, return, listing, audit, or approval claim.

operatorChecklist: Open the official X profile only: https://x.com/GCAAIGoChina
Confirm the post link points to the official website and not a copied or shortened link.
Confirm the network wording stays Base Mainnet / chainId 8453.
Confirm the official market route remains GCA/USDT.
Confirm the text does not claim third-party audit completion.
Confirm the text does not claim BaseScan token profile approval.
Confirm the text does not make price, return, listing, or market-prediction claims.
After publishing, record the new post URL in announcements.json and community.json before the next site update.

postPublishLedgerUpdate.action: Add the published X post URL, date, channel, and message to publishedPosts.
Update latestPostUrl and safeAnnouncement if the post should become a community reference.
Keep announcementHub.latestPostUrl aligned when the latest public X post changes.
No token-list change is required unless official links, route, or public status changes.

doNotPublish: return promises, price targets, market predictions, or investment advice
third-party audit completion before an independent report is public
BaseScan token profile approval before BaseScan publishes it
security-vendor approval before the vendor confirms it
LP lock, reserve lock, buyback, or price-support claim before evidence exists
any request for private keys, seed phrases, exchange API secrets, or wallet approvals
